title: Fathom adds a bot-less meeting mode in a bid to take on Granola
summary: Fathom is introducing a bot-less meeting mode with video, audio-only, and transcription options to compete directly with Granola. This addresses growing privacy concerns about recording bots while maintaining the ability to capture and process meeting information.
content: Fathom will allow you to choose between video, audio-only, and transcription modes.

zh.title: Fathom推出无机器人会议模式，试图与Granola竞争
zh.summary: Fathom推出无机器人会议模式，提供视频、纯音频和转录选项，直接与Granola竞争。这解决了对录音机器人日益增长的隐私担忧，同时保持了捕获和处理会议信息的能力。

title: The new Tomodachi Life is made to be shared — even if Nintendo doesn’t want you to
summary: Nintendo's new Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream expands creative tools to generate increasingly absurd scenarios and jokes, but imposes significant restrictions on sharing creations. The tension reflects Nintendo's cautious approach to user-generated content despite enabling the creativity that drives the game's appeal.
content:
Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream is hard to explain. The best way to understand is to see it in action; a screenshot of Handsome Squidward and Bob Belcher falling in love over their shared appreciation of cannibalism makes it clear that, while it's a life sim, the game is really a joke-generating machine. Living the Dream on the Nintendo Switch gives you more tools and fewer restrictions to make those jokes stranger and funnier. But while Living the Dream provides more freedom for creativity, it also has big restrictions on sharing those creations, and the game seems content with inside jokes staying within its virtual walls.
Living the Dre …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 新款朋友集合游戏是为共享而设计的——即使任天堂不希望你这样做
zh.summary: 任天堂新版《朋友集合游戏：梦想生活》扩展了创意工具以生成越来越荒诞的场景和笑话，但对创意分享施加了严格限制。这种矛盾反映了任天堂对用户生成内容的谨慎态度，尽管该公司为驱动游戏吸引力的创意提供了支持。

title: Microsoft faces fresh Windows Recall security concerns
summary: Microsoft's redesigned Windows Recall feature continues to face security vulnerabilities despite year-long efforts to secure it, with a new security tool demonstrating extractable data from the AI-powered screenshot system. The persistent concerns highlight ongoing challenges in balancing productivity features with user privacy protection.
content:
When Microsoft tried to launch Recall, an AI-powered Windows feature that screenshots most of what you do on your PC, it was labeled a "disaster" for cybersecurity and a "privacy nightmare." After the backlash and a year-long delay to redesign and secure Recall, it's once again facing security and privacy concerns.
Cybersecurity expert Alexander Hagenah has created TotalRecall Reloaded, a tool that extracts and displays data from Recall. It's an update to the TotalRecall tool that demonstrated all the weaknesses in the original Recall feature before Microsoft redesigned it.
Microsoft's redesign focused on creating a secure vault for Recall …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软面临Windows Recall的新安全隐忧
zh.summary: 微软重新设计的Windows Recall功能尽管经过一年多的安全加固努力，仍然面临安全漏洞，一款新的安全工具展示了从这个AI驱动的截图系统中可提取的数据。持续的安全顾虑突出了在平衡生产力功能与用户隐私保护之间的持续挑战。

title: Snap is laying off 16 percent of its staff as it leans into AI
summary: Snap is laying off 16 percent of its global workforce (approximately 1,000 employees) and closing 300 open positions as it pivots toward AI-driven profitability. CEO Evan Spiegel cited rapid AI advancements enabling teams to reduce repetitive work as justification, reflecting broader tech industry trends of using AI adoption to justify workforce restructuring.
content:
Snap is laying off roughly 16 percent of its global workforce in a cost-cutting effort to chase improved profitability with the help of AI. The cuts will impact around 1,000 full-time employees, according to a memo sent to staffers from Snap CEO Evan Spiegel. An additional 300 open roles are also being closed.
"While these changes are necessary to realize Snap's long-term potential, we believe that rapid advancements in artificial intelligence enable our teams to reduce repetitive work, increase velocity, and better support our community, partners, and advertisers," Spiegel wrote in the memo, which was included in the company's 8-K filing.  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Snap裁减16%员工，全力投向AI
zh.summary: Snap正在裁减全球员工的16%（约1000名员工），并关闭300个招聘岗位，以转向由AI驱动的盈利能力。首席执行官埃文·斯皮格尔引用AI技术的快速进步使团队能够减少重复工作作为理由，反映了科技行业利用AI采用来证明劳动力重组的更广泛趋势。

title: Spotify now sells printed books
summary: Spotify is expanding into physical book retail through a partnership with Bookshop.org, launching on Android with iOS support next week. The integration strengthens Spotify's role as a multi-format platform for readers while supporting independent bookstores through the partnership.
content:
The Bookshop.org integration is now available for Spotify users on Android, with iOS support expected next week. | Image: Spotify	

Spotify is rolling out some new updates for book lovers, expanding audiobook listening features and allowing users to buy physical publications through the platform. Readers in the US and UK can now purchase printed books via a new integration with Bookshop.org on the Android Spotify app, with support for iOS users expected to arrive next week. 
The partnership was announced in February, with Bookshop.org founder and CEO Andy Hunter saying at the time that "Spotify is bringing in more readers, and I'm all for anything that grows the size of the pie." This, alongside other updates announced today, aim to make it easier to jump into your next …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Spotify现在销售印刷书籍
zh.summary: Spotify通过与Bookshop.org的合作扩展到实体书零售，在Android上推出，下周将支持iOS。该整合强化了Spotify作为读者多格式平台的角色，同时通过该合作伙伴关系支持独立书店。

title: Grok’s sexual deepfakes almost got it banned from Apple’s App Store. Almost.
summary: Apple privately threatened to remove Elon Musk's AI app Grok from its App Store in January over inadequate moderation of nonconsensual sexual deepfakes, though ultimately did not follow through with removal. The behind-closed-doors threat highlights selective enforcement of Apple's platform policies and criticism of its reluctance to take stronger public action.
content:
Apple quietly threatened to kick Elon Musk's AI app, Grok, from its App Store in January over its failure to curb the surge of nonconsensual sexual deepfakes flooding X, according to NBC News. It was a muted show of force from one of tech's most powerful gatekeepers, made behind closed doors even as the undressing crisis unfolded in full public view and criticism over Apple's cowardice mounted.
In a letter obtained by NBC News, Apple told US senators it "contacted the teams behind both X and Grok after it received complaints and saw news coverage of the scandal" and demanded that the developers "create a plan to improve content moderation." …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Grok因性深度伪造险些被苹果下架
zh.summary: 苹果在1月份因Grok缺乏对非自愿性深度伪造的充分审核而私下威胁将埃隆·马斯克的AI应用程序Grok从App Store中删除，尽管最终并未执行删除。这一私下威胁突显了苹果平台政策的选择性执法，以及对其不愿采取更强有力的公开行动的批评。

title: Spotify launches the ability to purchase physical books in the US and UK
summary: Spotify is rolling out the ability to purchase physical books through Bookshop.org integration on Android, with iOS launching next week. The feature expands Spotify's book ecosystem beyond audiobooks and deepens user engagement across different content formats in US and UK markets.
content: Spotify users in the US and UK can officially purchase physical books through the Android app. iOS users will get the feature next week.

zh.title: Spotify在美国和英国推出购买实体书的功能
zh.summary: Spotify通过与Bookshop.org整合在安卓上推出购买实体书的功能，iOS版本将在下周推出。该功能扩展了Spotify的图书生态系统，超越有声读物，深化了用户在美国和英国市场对不同内容格式的参与度。

title: Anthropic’s rise is giving some OpenAI investors second thoughts
summary: Anthropic's $380 billion valuation is attracting investor interest as some OpenAI investors reassess the rationale for OpenAI's recent funding round, which assumes a $1.2 trillion-plus IPO valuation. The comparison highlights shifting investor sentiment in the competitive AI market.
content: One investor who has backed both companies told the FT that justifying OpenAI's recent round required assuming an IPO valuation of $1.2 trillion or more — making Anthropic's current $380 billion valuation look like the relative bargain.

zh.title: Anthropic的崛起让一些OpenAI投资者重新考虑
zh.summary: Anthropic的3800亿美元估值正在吸引投资者关注，一些OpenAI投资者正在重新评估OpenAI最近融资的合理性，该融资基于1.2万亿美元以上的IPO估值。这种对比突显了竞争激烈的AI市场中投资者情绪的变化。
